notes: Their main damage was Drongo (33k physical); 2/5 of us itemized armor.
Enemy ran 1/5 on or near their meta core — they were off-meta too, the win was there.

closingNote: Closed slow — we led objectives but the game ran 38 minutes. Convert Fangtooth/tower leads into ending the game, don't farm the lead and risk a throw.

threats: Chain-CC risk (4 hard-CC abilities, ~3.8s of lockdown): Crunch Right Crunch (knockup 1.25s), Riktor Riplash (pull), Riktor Shock Therapy (silence 0.8s), Riktor Skewer (suppress 1.25s). Don't group tight into it — stagger the engage and hold mobility/cleanse for the key one.
Dive threat on our backline: Crunch. Assign peel for the carry and ward the flanks.
synergy: Our engage/CC: Iggy & Scorch Inferno (knockback), Grux Crush (knockup 0.5s). Our kills come from landing burst INSIDE that CC window — whoever lands it, the rest must follow up immediately.
We have sustain (Zinx) — favor the longer fight where our heals out-grind them.
Strong AoE/teamfight kit — group at choke points and fight on top of objectives.

ourKits.combo: Detection Protocol track → Chrono Swipe → Primeval Roar shield → Ursine Burst grab ult
ourKits.winCondition: grab a key target out of position and burst them down
ourKits.playWith: a team that collapses on his grabbed target
ourKits.playAgainst: his grab ult is the whole threat — bait it / stay spaced; CC during Primeval Roar

ourKits.combo: Oil Spill → Molotov ignite → Flame Turret → Inferno knockback ult
ourKits.winCondition: layer fire zones on a choke/objective and burn the team
ourKits.playWith: CC that holds enemies in his fire
ourKits.playAgainst: don't fight in his zones — flank; kill the turret, dive him

ourKits.combo: Smash 'n Grab pull → Crush knockup → Warlord's Challenge stun → bleed-stacked basics
ourKits.winCondition: land the pull→knockup chain to lock a target while bleed and AS shred them
ourKits.passive: basics stack a bleed for sustained damage
ourKits.playWith: follow-up burst inside his knockup/stun window
ourKits.playAgainst: telegraphed engage — bait Crush/Pull, then punish; kite his slow start

ourKits.combo: Static Trap root → Buckshot → Hot Pursuit AS → Long Arm of the Law global snipe
ourKits.winCondition: trap for the root, then out-range with Shots Fired and finish with the global ult
ourKits.passive: every 5th basic is a long-range bonus shot
ourKits.playWith: frontline/peel to protect his low mobility
ourKits.playAgainst: almost no escape — engage past the trap and he dies

ourKits.combo: Ricochet stun → Bad Medicine zone → Infuse heal an ally → Neural Regenesis revive
ourKits.winCondition: keep an ally alive with Infuse + the revive ult and poke with Ricochet
ourKits.playWith: a carry she can pocket-heal and revive
ourKits.playAgainst: she can't heal herself — dive HER; bait the revive before committing

enemyKits.combo: Bull Rush knockback → Force Shield wall → Shield Slam knockup+stun ult, Shield Bash %hp
enemyKits.winCondition: peel the carry with walls/knockups or engage with Shield Slam
enemyKits.playWith: a carry he can wall for and peel
enemyKits.playAgainst: his Force Shield blocks projectiles — reposition around it; bait Shield Slam

enemyKits.combo: Forward Crunch gap-close stun → Right Crunch knockup → empowered Left Crunch, sustain via Re-Crunch
enemyKits.winCondition: all-in a squishy with the empowered combo and heal back through Re-Crunch
enemyKits.passive: post-ability empowered basic that refunds cooldowns
enemyKits.playWith: peel-stripping engage so he reaches the backline
enemyKits.playAgainst: peel/CC him off — without resets he's stranded; anti-heal blunts Re-Crunch

enemyKits.combo: Energy Shield block → Displacement Blast → Assault Mode → GTFO lockon ult
enemyKits.winCondition: out-trade with Pulsefire and the spell-shield, finish with GTFO
enemyKits.playWith: peel so he can free-cast in Assault Mode
enemyKits.playAgainst: bait Energy Shield, then commit; dodge GTFO's slow channel

enemyKits.combo: Old Rusty slow → Gag Grenade silence → Rad Rounds basics → Shrapnel Cannon armor shred
enemyKits.winCondition: kite back, stack Wastelander bleed and Rad Rounds, melt from range
enemyKits.playWith: peel and frontline so he can free-fire
enemyKits.playAgainst: low mobility — dive him or break LoS through his poke; he folds to hard engage

enemyKits.combo: Riplash pull → Shock Therapy silence → Skewer suppress ult
enemyKits.winCondition: pull a target in and chain silence+suppress for a guaranteed kill
enemyKits.playWith: burst that deletes his pulled/suppressed target
enemyKits.playAgainst: respect Riplash range — stay spaced; cleanse/QSS the suppress

itemTimelineNote: estMin = first minute the role's measured median gold curve covers the cumulative inventory cost (slot order ≈ purchase order) — THEORY, no purchase timestamps in either API

fights.note: caught-out = deaths outside every clustered fight; costs/conversion use a 90s window over timeline majors (older film — no tower times; Fang/Prime/Orb only); itemGap counts participants' items est. online (median-gold model, THEORY)
